rooms.title: The Perfect Balance between Modernity and Serenity
rooms.description: Enjoy a large 73 m² apartment, ideally located in the center of Tangier. This modern-designed accommodation welcomes you with two elegant bedrooms, equipped with Smart TVs and very comfortable beds (hypoallergenic bedding). One of the bedrooms opens onto a private balcony with a superb view of the city and the mountains. The living room is spacious and bright. With its comfortable sofas, elegant carpet and large Smart TV, it's the perfect place to relax. The kitchen is modern, fully equipped and opens onto a sunny terrace. For your well-being, the apartment has central air conditioning and soundproofed windows (double glazing) to guarantee your peace and quiet. Whether for family vacations, groups of friends or business travelers, everything has been designed for your total comfort.
features: 2 comfortable bedrooms: Bedroom #1: Double bed, wardrobe, safe and flat-screen TV. It opens onto a private balcony with a superb view. Bedroom #2: Two single beds with Smart TV.
Plus: High-quality hypoallergenic bedding, soundproofed windows, central air conditioning.
01 modern Bright Living Room with comfortable sofas, designer table and Smart TV. Prayer rug available.
01 Fully equipped kitchen: Electric hob, extractor hood, built-in microwave oven, refrigerator, washing machine, coffee maker and kettle. Essential kitchen utensils provided.
01 Sunny Patio (the kitchen opens onto a sunny patio).
01 Bathroom: Modern shower, clean towels, hairdryer and toiletries provided.

rooms.title: The blend of comfort & warmth
rooms.description: Welcome to a modern and warm setting, designed for your absolute well-being. This spacious 73 m² apartment welcomes you with two cozy bedrooms, each equipped with its own Smart TV, hypoallergenic bedding and soundproofed windows to guarantee you totally peaceful nights. Relax in a light-filled living room, also equipped with a large Smart TV, or enjoy your equipped kitchen opening onto a private balcony with a breathtaking view. Its contemporary bathroom completes this haven of comfort, ideal for your stays in Tangier.

rooms.title: LUXURY AND SERENITY
rooms.description: Treat yourself to an exceptional stay at Appart-Hôtel LA TERAL, in the heart of Tangier. This chic 73 m² apartment combines luxury and serenity to accommodate families, business travelers and groups of friends in absolute comfort. Enjoy two elegantly designed bedrooms, air-conditioned, perfectly soundproofed and each equipped with its own Smart TV. Relax in a modern and warm living room or prepare your meals in a fully equipped kitchen. A real charm asset, it opens onto a private balcony offering a soothing view of the mountains and the city. A contemporary bathroom and quality services complete this ideal haven for your stay.
features: 2 comfortable bedrooms: Bedroom 1: Double bed, wardrobe with integrated safe. Bedroom 2: Two comfortable single beds.
Sleep Plus: Hypoallergenic bedding, central air conditioning and soundproofed windows and Smart TV in each bedroom.

rooms.title: Comfort & Serenity
rooms.description: Discover absolute comfort in this modern 65 m² apartment at Appart Hôtel LA TERAL. Ideal for families or business trips, this air-conditioned accommodation has two comfortable bedrooms with Smart TV and soundproofed windows for total rest. Relax in a bright living room and enjoy a fully equipped kitchen to prepare your meals with complete freedom. An elegant bathroom, free WiFi and secure parking complete this haven, designed to offer you a perfect and hassle-free stay.
